title: 분사 (현재분사/과거분사)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 분사(구)를 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 현재분사인지 과거분사인지 표시한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: I received a letter written in English.

answer.analysis: I received a letter [written in English].

problems.stem: The crying baby wants his mother.
The information downloaded from the internet may not be true.

answer.analysis: The information [downloaded from the internet] may not be true.
드된] 정보는 사실이 아닐 수도 있다. (현재분사) The movie was [boring].

problems.stem: The car parked in front of my house is not mine.

answer.analysis: The car [parked in front of my house] is not mine.
answer.translation: [내 집 앞에 주차된] 차는 내 것이 아니

problems.stem: There is a sleeping cat on the sofa.

answer.analysis: 다. (현재분사) There is a [sleeping] cat on the sofa.

problems.stem: I'm interested in learning new things.

answer.translation: 나는 새로운 것을 배우는 데 [흥미가 있다]. (내가 흥

problems.stem: The boy reading a book in the corner is my brother.

answer.analysis: 미를 느낌) (현재분사) The boy [reading a book in the corner] is my brother.

problems.stem: Most of the products made in this factory are exported.

answer.analysis: 내 남동생이다. (과거분사) Most of the products [made in this factory] are exported.
부분은 수출된다. (현재분사) The [shocking] news spread quickly.
